programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: After Starsky shoots a 16-year-old armed robber a crazed ex-con vows to kill uniformed policemen until Starsky resigns from the force

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When some thermonuclear detonators are stolen Hawke tried to find them with Airwolfs thermal sensors But the man who stole them plans to use Airwolf to transport them And part of his plan is seducing Caitlin

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A witch fights to gain a powerful occult symbol using a helpless Ryan in the process

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car Then its Matt and Froys big repo Having left the company to start their own they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion And finally Lou Lyndah and Lous cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now hes ready to do the hurting

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a photographer an old friend of the McCains is accused of murder Mark and Lucas find themselves on opposite sides against each other

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A wagon train master forces a young couple to marry after they hide the fact that one is a girl and Lucas takes them in to help them; but trouble soon arises when a drunken crowd calls for a Shivaree

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E26 Anybody Can Kill a Marshal
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E26 Anybody Can Kill a Marshal

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ross Marquettes behavior over the past few months cant be easily explained -- beating his wife rustling cattle robbing a stage killing a man Adam is determined to find out why his friend is acting so strangely before its too late

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon must help Professor Neilsen reach Washington with his invention - a new and extremely powerful explosive But a diminutive genius has ambitions of his own and they require the professors death When the professor dies West and Gordon must discover his killer before the madmans plans unfold and Professor Neilsen has a lot of company

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being mugged by four hoodlums Kimble is reluctant to deal with the police But while leaving town he ends up getting handcuffed to a policewoman When she breaks her ankle Kimble has to help her while evading the police manhunt

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike hunts down a killer whale that has been terrorizing a local coastal community

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike pilots a mini-submarine in an attempt to rescue a Russian scientist defector from a ship where he is being held by his Soviet kidnappers

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gallagher and his crew are forced to land in occupied Yugoslavia where he must make a deal with a rebel leader to get help to repair his plane

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A smooth talking vitamin salesman contends with a rival and a mysterious woman he follows home

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie are puzzled by the rapid aging of a murder victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate the murder of a gym owner and realize that a mysterious pair of boxing gloves may be to blame

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A couple move into an old house that is supposedly haunted but the wife soon realizes just whos haunting the house Later another couple move into the house and form an unusual relationship with the moving man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Cathy wants a rich and successful life and fast She visits a medium who tells her she will meet a man who will inherit a lot of money and die in a violent way soon after When she meets grossly overweight Charlie who informs her of his rich relatives she promptly marries him As it turns out the medium is always right

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy and elderly man subjects himself to a revolutionary new treatment in order to please his gold-digger girlfriend Unfortunately becoming young again turns out to be very expensive

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A young gigolo stays with a washed up film director and his lonely abused wife on an isolated island

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and Fang investigate an animal spa where other agents dogs killed them after visiting it

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans 327
programme.desc: Hogans 327

programme.title: Hogans 316
programme.desc: Hogans 316

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Under the impression that Parker is an Ace Gunner Binghamton wagers one of his most prized possessions that Parker can out-shoot an arrogant Captains best gunner

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A lovely French girl agrees to help the guys out in a plan to raise expense money for the birth of Christys child

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Mary Ann watches Ginger perform on the island she hits her head giving her amnesia thus believing that she is Ginger Grant Everyone plays along until Mary Ann cant act or dance and her memory comes back

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa Luke Kate Hassie and Little Luke McCoy travel from Smokey Corners West Virginia to California They take over an inherited farm and everyone loves it but Grandpa who has trouble adjusting to the new place

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets into an egg feud with a rival egg salesman He makes money but the rest of the family suffers when Hassie wants to date the rivals son

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS agents from all over are each carrying one piece of a bomb that is going to be used against a government base Max has to disarm it

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna allow Kirk to hold his new singles group at the inn

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: In the second season opener the series develops a more supernaturalweird tone as Mitch and Griff investigate a sunken freighter where they fight for their lives against an unknown force and realize that the freighter might have been sunk by a New Guinea sea monster according to a woman they found floating in the ocean near sunken wreckage of her sailboat

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police captain William Boone is asked to join the security team of Companion Daan of the Taelon an alien race that came to earth three years ago

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to clone a popular motivational speaker in order to control the minds of the rich and powerful Suzanne and Harrison plan to capture an alien drone

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Earth The Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone tries to find out who murdered his wife

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A young patient from a psychiatric home tells the police that an elderly patient at the facility was murdered After the young man is found dead himself Steve decides to feign mental illness to gain admittance to the place fearing that someone may be killing patients

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An elderly cardinal has been taken prisoner in a fictional Eastern European country because the clergyman is the leader of the political opposition The IMF force is tasked with freeing him from the inescapable prison

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: After a whirlwind courtship Nick proposes to a beautiful partygirl Eastern socialite Her interest in him soon disappears when she experiences the slow paced life on the ranch-and becomes obsessed with Heath

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne last member of a posse is shot by a trap set by the outlaw Black Jack A sister of woman married to a judge finds him and takes him home at a remote cabin as a winter storm snows them in The judge leads a dual life

programme.desc: After a mob enforcer still wearing his brass knuckles falls to death from a high-rise hotel window the police seal off the hotel and hunt for two other mobsters and the down-and-out boxer who was their planned target

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Will Quijada v. Sean Kearney

programme.desc: Callum Jones v. Rikki Fortuna

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Rising Star Ryan Dickson including never seen before interviews and his fights in chronological order.

programme.title: The ZOCHI Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill s second-in-command is captured by the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kills toy reduces the human race to electrical impulses imprisoned within five crystal globes

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Herculoids
programme.desc: Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Monster Minds are planted aboard the Pride to contaminate the water supply The water is jettisoned forcing Herc to land the Pride in search of water and a Cobalt-49 crystal to repair the guidance system damaged by the vines This is all part of Saw Boss trap Flora sees the vines and goes to warn Gillian who is searching for a crystal They are trapped and Gillian falls off a bridge into a river Saw Boss sets another trap knowing Jayce will return for Gillian but Jayce calls upon the ring for help and defeats the Monster Minds and rescues Gillian

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To lure Jayce to his death Saw Boss puts a marker in the shape of the root on an ice planet that is about to be destroyed by a volcano Herc lands the Pride on the ice which is then nearly covered by an avalanche The native people seek help from Jayce and everyone goes to work building an ice dam and storing up snow to drop into the volcano Monster Minds attack complicating things but they end up helping the people when their lasers blast the dam which prevents the volcano from erupting when all the ice covers it up

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK
